title: helichrysum umbellatum
intro: Helichrysum umbellatum, also known as Yellow Cushion or Everlasting, is a low-growing, perennial herb belonging to the daisy family that is native to South Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Helichrysum umbellatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate anxiety and stress, as well as its ability to aid in the healing of wounds and skin conditions. Helichrysum umbellatum can be consumed in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, or applied topically as an essential oil to harness its medicinal properties.
